Patient: VOL04

34-year-old female volunteer, no cardiovascular history, normotensive.
Enrolled as a healthy control for a 4D flow MRI reproducibility study.

Measurements:
- Heart rate 68 bpm at rest
- Blood pressure 122/76 mmHg
- No clinical indication for treatment

Imaging:
- 4D flow MRI acquired on a 3T scanner, inlet velocity field available as
  per-timestep boundaryData under constant/boundaryData/inlet/ in the case
  directory. Segmentation of the thoracic aorta and supra-aortic branches
  has already been done.

Study goal:
- Produce a bulk hemodynamic reference (velocity field, pressure gradient,
  stroke volume preservation) for comparison against a wall-resolved LES
  from the literature. This is a validation case, not a clinical study.
